headline: Record Club is trying to be Letterboxd for music nerds
summary: Record Club aims to be a social platform for music enthusiasts. It seeks to fill the gap left by crowded alternatives like Rate Your Music. The app focuses on cataloging listening habits and connecting fans.

headline: The man behind the legendary MPC, Roger Linn, stays focused with a single browser tab
summary: Roger Linn, creator of iconic drum machines like the LM-1 and LinnDrum, is a music tech legend. He pioneered sampling with the LM-1, used on countless records. Linn maintains focus by limiting himself to a single browser tab.

headline: Here are 38 Memorial Day deals we recommend for $50 or less
summary: Find 38 recommended Memorial Day tech deals under $50. Discounts include portable chargers and 4K streaming devices. Offers provide great value despite not being high-ticket items like OLED TVs.

headline: Hanging out in my favorite virtual coffee shop in Tokyo
summary: The author enjoys a virtual coffee shop experience set in Tokyo. It offers a comfortable, personalized escape reminiscent of real cafes. This virtual space provides a unique sense of belonging and relaxation.

headline: Ranking the Star Wars Movies From Worst to Best
summary: An article ranks all live-action Star Wars movies. The list includes popular titles like The Mandalorian and Grogu. It offers a comprehensive comparison from worst to best.

headline: Assassin's Creed Black Flag Resynced Confirmed to Feature Drunk Load Screen After Ubisoft Post Confuses Fans
summary: Ubisoft confirms the "drunk load screen" will return in Assassin's Creed Black Flag Resynced. Fans were initially confused by a misleading post about the feature. Edward Kenway will still stumble drunkenly during loading sequences.

headline: The Boys Actor Antony Starr Says Goodbye to Homelander With Spoiler-Heavy Behind-the-Scenes Photos
summary: Antony Starr, who plays Homelander in "The Boys," bids farewell to the role. He shared spoiler-filled behind-the-scenes photos on Instagram. The posts mark the conclusion of the show for the actor.

headline: The Best Deals Today: M5 MacBook Air, AirPods Pro 3, Monster Hunter Stories 3, and More
summary: Discover today's top deals on tech and gaming products. Featured items include the M5 MacBook Air and AirPods Pro 3. Also find discounts on games like Monster Hunter Stories 3.

headline: Girl raped by boys spared jail tells BBC judge's decision was like 'rock in my face'
summary: A 16-year-old girl describes her distress after her rapists avoided jail. She expressed feeling betrayed by the judicial system. Her testimony highlighted the emotional toll of the court's decision.

headline: Suspect killed after opening fire on Secret Service near White House
summary: A suspect was killed after opening fire near a White House checkpoint. Secret Service agents were involved in the incident. One bystander was reportedly wounded during the exchange.

headline: Large-scale Russian attack on Ukraine leaves four dead and dozens injured
summary: A major Russian missile attack killed four and injured dozens in Ukraine. Russia confirmed using the Oreshnik missile, traveling over 10 times the speed of sound. The attack caused widespread devastation and casualties.

headline: Midnight Sun-derland: Zara Larsson electrifies the crowd at Big Weekend
summary: Swedish pop star Zara Larsson performed an energetic set at Big Weekend. She delivered a series of high-energy pop bangers. The performance captivated the crowds on the festival's second day.
